ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutes" (
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institute */,
  "institute_name" TEXT /* Name of the institute */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* City where the institute is located */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* State where the institute is located */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Country where the institute is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institute */,
  "institute_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each institute */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the institute was established */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website URL of the institute */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the institute's logo */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the institute */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institute offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "program_duration_text" TEXT /* Text description of the program duration */,
  "tests_accepted" TEXT /* Admission tests accepted for the program */,
  "test_cutoff" TEXT /* Cutoff score for the admission test */,
  "tution_fees_local_country_student" INTEGER /* Tuition fees for local country students */,
  "final_placements_domestic_salary_avg" INTEGER /* Average salary of domestic placements for the program */,
  "program_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., Full-time, Part-time, Executive) */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Detailed eligibility criteria for the program */,
  "admission_process" TEXT /* Description of the admission process */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for program applications */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats available for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specializations" (
  "specialization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialization */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program offering the specialization */,
  "specialization_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialization */,
  "specialization_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the specialization */,
  "core_courses" TEXT /* List of core courses in the specialization */,
  "optional_courses" TEXT /* List of optional courses in the specialization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specializations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the admission test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the admission test */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the test (e.g., Annual, Bi-annual) */,
  "test_fee" INTEGER /* Fee for taking the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "test_format" TEXT /* Format of the test (e.g., Online, Pen and Paper) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_tests" (
  "program_test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program-test mapping */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_tests_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES admission_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_tests_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placements" (
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placement record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the placement */,
  "domestic_salary_avg" INTEGER /* Average salary for domestic placements */,
  "international_salary_avg" INTEGER /* Average salary for international placements */,
  "placement_rate" INTEGER /* Percentage of students who got placed */,
  "total_students_placed" INTEGER /* Total number of students who got placed */,
  "highest_salary" INTEGER /* Highest salary offered */,
  "lowest_salary" INTEGER /* Lowest salary offered */,
  "top_companies" TEXT /* List of top companies where students got placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the fee structure */,
  "local_country_student_fee" INTEGER /* Tuition fees for local country students */,
  "international_student_fee" INTEGER /* Tuition fees for international students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_fees_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., undergraduate, postgraduate, faculty, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the program */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., student, alumni, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_reviews_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being applied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user applying */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "application_fee" INTEGER /* Fee for the application */,
  "application_documents" TEXT /* List of documents required for the application */,
  "interview_status" TEXT /* Status of the interview (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interview_result" TEXT /* Result of the interview (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_applications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
